author: Ethan
name: Int6 QAT from Step 1 — 2048 Context + Full Bank QAT
blurb: Int6 QAT active from step 1 across ALL weights including parameter banks (Q, K, V, O, MLP up/down). Previous QAT only covered CastedLinear layers; this adds _fq_bank() STE fake-quant wrapping all bank slices in forward(). Training context 2048 for ~7200 steps in 10min. Unique contribution: full-model int6 noise hardening vs #1 which only applies late QAT.
